allow: Bash(node -p "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''web/public/data/enriched-positions.json'',''utf8''\)\); const wc=d.filter\(p=>p.church_infos && p.church_infos[0] && p.church_infos[0].lat\); ''Enriched: ''+d.length+'' total, ''+wc.length+'' with coords''")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db=new Database\(''data/vocationhub.db''\); console.log\(db.prepare\(''SELECT source, COUNT\(*\) as c, SUM\(CASE WHEN lat IS NOT NULL AND lat != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as wc FROM parishes GROUP BY source''\).all\(\)\)")

Bash(node -p "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''web/public/data/enriched-positions.json'',''utf8''\)\); JSON.stringify\({name: d[0].name, diocese: d[0].diocese, ci_name: d[0].church_infos?.[0]?.name, ci_lat: d[0].church_infos?.[0]?.lat, ci_nid: d[0].church_infos?.[0]?.nid}\)")

Bash(node -p "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''web/public/data/enriched-positions.json'',''utf8''\)\); d.filter\(p=>p.church_infos && p.church_infos[0] && p.church_infos[0].lat\).length + '' of '' + d.length + '' have coords''")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\(''./web/public/data/enriched-positions.json''\); const sample = data[0]; console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(sample\).sort\(\)\); console.log\(''Has parochials:'', !!sample.parochials\); console.log\(''Has comp_breakdown:'', !!sample.comp_breakdown\); if\(sample.parochials\) console.log\(''Parochials sample:'', JSON.stringify\(sample.parochials[0], null, 2\).substring\(0, 300\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\(''./web/public/data/enriched-positions.json''\); const sample = data[0]; console.log\(''Keys:'', Object.keys\(sample\).sort\(\)\); console.log\(''Has parochials:'', !!sample.parochials\); console.log\(''Has comp_breakdown:'', !!sample.comp_breakdown\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\(''./web/public/data/enriched-positions.json''\)\); sample = data[0]; print\(''Keys in first record:'', sorted\(sample.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''Has parochials:'', ''parochials'' in sample and sample[''parochials''] is not None\); print\(''Has comp_breakdown:'', ''comp_breakdown'' in sample and sample[''comp_breakdown''] is not None\); print\(''Has census:'', ''census'' in sample\); print\(''Value of comp_breakdown:'', sample.get\(''comp_breakdown'', ''NOT FOUND''\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\(''./web/public/data/enriched-extended.json''\)\); sample = data[0]; print\(''Keys in first extended record:'', sorted\(sample.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''Has parochials:'', ''parochials'' in sample and sample[''parochials''] is not None\); print\(''Has comp_breakdown:'', ''comp_breakdown'' in sample and sample[''comp_breakdown''] is not None\); print\(''Has census:'', ''census'' in sample\); print\(''Parochials value:'', ''YES'' if sample.get\(''parochials''\) else ''NO/Empty''\); print\(''Comp_breakdown value:'', sample.get\(''comp_breakdown'', ''NOT FOUND''\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -like ''*serve*'' -or $_.Name -like ''*serve*'' } | Select-Object Id, Name, Path")

Bash(powershell -Command "foreach \($f in @\(''out\\index.html'',''out\\index.txt'',''out\\claim\\index.txt''\)\) { $handles = & handle64.exe $f 2>$null; if \($handles\) { Write-Output $handles } else { Write-Output ''No handle tool or no locks found for $f'' } }")
